EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used when new business team have sold a policy to highlight Feefo.
EmailTemplate.name: Feefo Review
EmailTemplate.subject: Please rate the service I provided
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for purchasing with Kingsbridge!
If you have any questions at any time, please send me an email and I’ll be happy to help.
We use Feefo, an independent review service for our reviews and they may email you directly with a review request.
If you were to rate the service I’ve provided and mention my name in this review it would be greatly appreciated.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
